rationale: Keep: the citing paper explicitly states it "extends prior online word-of-mouth sales studies" that link observed rating summaries to sales, and the cited 2006 paper is a core study doing exactly this (review valence/volume effects on relative sales via a cross-site DiD design). This looks like a substantive prior benchmark/foundation rather than an incidental mention, and it is directly matched by DOI (10.1509/jmkr.43.3.345).
